news.headline: Hexaware Technologies wins AI Implementer of the Year at AIconics Awards in New York on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Iselin, New Jersey, Hexaware Technologies, a prominent IT solutions and service provider, achieved recognition by winning the AI Implementer of the Year award at the esteemed AIconics Awards. The company is set to be honored at The AI Summit New York on the same date. This signifies a significant accomplishment for Hexaware Technologies in the field of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Terreno Realty Corporation buys property in Brooklyn, NY for $156.3 million.
news.summary: Real estate investment company Terreno Realty Corporation has recently purchased a property located in Brooklyn, New York for a total of $156.3 million. This acquisition marks a significant move for the corporation as it expands its portfolio in the region. The property is expected to contribute to the company's growth and strategic investment goals in the coming months.

Michael Saylor lauds Bitcoin hitting $100,000 milestone in Galaxy Research podcast, sees it as proof of permanence and predicts it will be embraced by wealthy and powerful.
news.summary: During the recent episode of the "Galaxy Brains" podcast by Galaxy Research, Michael Saylor, the executive chairman of MicroStrategy (NASDAQ:MSTR), discussed Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) significant surge to $100,000. Saylor referred to this development as a "numeric punctuation" and predicted widespread acceptance of Bitcoin in the future. He emphasized that reaching this milestone demonstrates Bitcoin's permanence and establishes it as a fundamental element of the financial sector. Saylor expressed his belief that Bitcoin is not simply a component of the upcoming financial landscape but is actively influencing and shaping it. This shift was outlined by Saylor as Bitcoin's evolution from a speculative investment to an institutional fixture. The podcast discussing these insights was released recently, and Saylor highlighted this moment as a clear indication of Bitcoin's growing importance.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: PEPP flexibility has not been used since July 2023.
Rhino will offer "Loss of Employment Protection" to renters for financial support in case of job loss.
news.summary: Starting today, Rhino, known for its innovative security deposit insurance, is launching a new program in New York aimed at providing renters with peace of mind by offering financial security in the event of sudden job loss. This program comes as a response to the rising need for support in uncertain times. The initiative is set to benefit a significant number of renters, aiming to address the concerns of those facing unexpected unemployment.

news.headline: Wholesale inflation data supports Fed's possible interest rate cut.
Russia is said to near deal on keeping military bases in Syria.
YO Mobile partners with AT&T to offer combined US and Mexican phone lines in one account. Chicharito named global brand ambassador. Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: Yonder Media Mobile Inc. has announced a new partnership with AT&T allowing customers to combine US and Mexican local phone lines under a single US-based account. This marks the first time such a service is available. The partnership was revealed in New York on December 12, 2024. Yonder Media Mobile Inc., the provider of YO Mobile and the sole MVNO operating across both the US and Mexico, is involved in this collaboration.

news.headline: CloudCover launches CoverIT™ Platform for IT lifecycle and service solutions, specializing in TPM and service delivery.
news.summary: CloudCover, a prominent provider of IT lifecycle management and IT service management solutions based in Irvine, California, has recently introduced the CoverIT™ Platform. This innovative software suite is specifically designed for Third-Party Maintenance (TPM) and service delivery, offering intelligent solutions. The launch of CoverIT™ marks a significant advancement for the company, showcasing its commitment to enhancing IT services. The software addresses the growing need for efficient TPM solutions and aims to streamline IT processes. The platform is expected to greatly benefit clients seeking optimized service management.

news.headline: Cohen & Company acquires Tax & Wealth Management, Inc. to expand services, becoming a top US tax firm.
news.summary: Cohen & Company, a leading tax and accounting firm in the U.S., has expanded its family office and private client service offerings by welcoming Tax and Wealth Management, Inc. (TWM) into its fold. TWM, a boutique CPA firm located in downtown Cleveland, will now be part of Cohen & Company's wide-ranging services. This partnership brings together two prominent firms, providing clients with a robust suite of financial services. This move enhances Cohen & Company's position as a top player in the industry, with increased capabilities to cater to the needs of clients.

news.headline: Riverside Research secures $160M contract from DIU to boost national security via commercial tech adoption.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 12, 2024, it was reported that Riverside Research emerged as the victor in a competitive bidding process, securing an award to support DIU in its objective of enhancing national security. The organization's mission is centered on expediting the integration of commercial technology within the military sector while fortifying both allied and national security efforts. This development showcases Riverside Research's success in the bidding process and underlines its commitment to furthering national security goals.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: I have no reason to doubt staff projections.
XORTX to present at Rare and Genetic Kidney Disease Summit in Boston regarding research on polycystic kidney disease.
news.summary: XORTX Therapeutics Inc., a leading clinical pharmaceutical company targeting progressive kidney disease, recently disclosed details of Dr. Allen Davidoff's presentation at the Rare and Genetic Kidney Disease Summit in Boston, Massachusetts. The event took place on December 12, 2024, at 10:30 am ET. The presentation titled “Autosomal Dominant Polycystic Kidney Disease - Genetic and Environmental Factors → Evidence for Aberrant Purine Metabolism as a Second Hit Determining Disease Progression” shed light on crucial factors impacting disease progression. XORTX, listed on NASDAQ (XRTX), TSXV (XRTX), and Frankfurt (ANU), remains dedicated to advancing innovative therapies for kidney diseases.

news.headline: New DeFi product by Superform, backed by Circle & VanEck, offers 'Intelligent' USDC yield opportunities. #Crypto #DeFi #VanEck
news.summary: Backed by major companies Circle and VanEck, Superform has introduced a new product designed to streamline the process of identifying yield opportunities within the decentralized finance (DeFi) space. The product is automated and aims to leverage the expertise of the companies involved to maximize returns for users. This initiative signifies a major step forward in the DeFi sector and has the potential to greatly impact users looking to capitalize on the growing popularity of decentralized finance.

news.headline: NATO Chief Rutte: We will need a lot more than 2% of GDP for defence.
Trump: I might veto a budget or appropriations that does not comply with newly created Department of Government Efficiency - Time Interview.
Willdan to implement SnoPUD's energy efficiency program for data centers in a 3-year initiative. ($WLDN)
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Willdan Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WLDN) revealed that it has secured the contract to execute the energy efficiency initiative for telecommunications and data center facilities at Snohomish County Public Utility District (SnoPUD). This three-year program aims to assess energy efficiency prospects in mission-critical facilities of data centers and telecommunication companies. The project includes identifying opportunities, seeking utility incentives, and executing energy-efficient projects. This initiative signifies a significant step towards enhancing energy efficiency in these crucial sectors.

news.headline: TruStage™ appoints Jon Winderman as new CFO, replacing Laurie Winger, who is retiring. Announcement made today.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on December 12, 2024, TruStage, a reputable insurance, investment, and technology firm, revealed the selection of Jon Winderman as their incoming Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Winderman will succeed Laurie Winger, who is set to retire by the end of...

news.headline: Hixny is the first HRSN validated data stream by NCQA, achieving a significant milestone for New York's health exchange.
news.summary: On January 1st, the New York Health Equity Reform 1115 Waiver Amendment was implemented, signifying a major milestone for New York's primary health information exchange. Hixny, the state's advanced health information exchange (HIE), based in Albany, achieved this significant feat. This amendment aims to enhance health equity and access to healthcare services for all New Yorkers. It brings about positive changes in the healthcare system, affecting a large number of individuals across the state. The milestone further emphasizes the continuous efforts to improve healthcare quality and availability through technology and information sharing in the state.

news.headline: FEMA and Ad Council launch new PSAs to encourage AANHPI communities to enhance disaster preparedness, targeting 6M individuals.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, FEMA in collaboration with the Ad Council unveiled new PSAs aimed at promoting preparedness among Asian American, Native Hawaiian, and Pacific Islander (AANHPI) populations. These public service advertisements are part of the "Ready" campaign and emphasize the importance of readiness for potential risks and disasters. The initiative seeks to engage AANHPI communities and educate them on disaster preparedness measures.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Direction of travel is very clear.
ECB's President Lagarde: A lot of ground has been covered.
Trump does not rule out using recess appointments to fill cabinet vacancies if he cannot get them approved - Time Interview.
AbsoluteCare to enter 4 new markets in 2025: Akron, Dayton, Cincinnati in Ohio and Chicago, Illinois.
news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland on December 12, 2024, AbsoluteCare, a prominent player in value-based healthcare, announced plans to broaden its presence into four additional markets in 2025. The new markets include Akron, Dayton, and Cincinnati in Ohio, as well as Chicago in Illinois. This strategic expansion aims to increase AbsoluteCare's impact and coverage across regions, with the potential to serve a significant number of individuals in these areas.

news.headline: AI utilized by Orion for NOAA data processing. Orion, a subsidiary of Arcfield, awarded new work from NOAA.
news.summary: Orion Space Solutions (Orion), a subsidiary of Arcfield in Chantilly, Virginia, disclosed receiving a new contract from the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) on December 12, 2024. The agreement aims to assist NOAA with its Advanced Access Methods for Earth.

news.headline: Zynex study shows laser technology reduces racial bias in LED pulse oximeters. Story on innovative medical devices.
news.summary: Zynex, Inc., a leading medical technology company based in Englewood, Colorado, announced on December 12, 2024, that it is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol ZYXI. The company is known for its innovative noninvasive medical devices used for pain management, rehabilitation, and patient monitoring.

news.headline: Verinext chosen as launch partner for Zerto Cloud Vault. Leading MSP selected for providing cyberthreat protection.
news.summary: Verinext, a prominent Managed Service Provider (MSP), has been selected as the primary provider of Zerto's innovative solution for adaptable cyberthreat protection. The announcement was made on December 12, 2024, in Philadelphia. Verinext is recognized for delivering significant business impact via technology and services.

news.headline: Sublime Security raises $60M in Series B funding to revolutionize email security with AI technology and appoints Colin Jones as President.
news.summary: Sublime Security, the AI-powered email security platform, has revealed new funding just seven months after securing its Series A funding. This announcement underscores the company's significant product advancements and growing customer base. Furthermore, Colin Jones has been appointed as the President of the company. This recent development marks Sublime Security's continued success in the industry.

news.headline: Cemtrex's Vicon partners with Hailo to integrate Hailo-15 SoC into NEXT Modular Camera System, raising video intelligence bar.
news.summary: In Hauppauge, NY on Dec. 12, 2024, Cemtrex Inc. (NASDAQ: CETX, CETXP) revealed that its subsidiary, Vicon Industries, Inc., has formed a partnership with Hailo, an AI chip manufacturer recognized for its high-performance edge AI processors. This collaboration aims to enhance video intelligence by incorporating the innovative Hailo-15 System-on-a-Chip (SoC) into Vicon’s NEXT Modular Camera System. This move is set to push the boundaries of security technology and industrial services, with the joint venture positioning Vicon at the forefront of cutting-edge AI technology integration.

news.headline: Fluence Gridstack Pro 2000 exceeds safety standards for energy storage with deflagration testing by Fluence and DNV, along with large-scale fire testing by Fluence and CSA Group, confirming it as the first domestic content solution to surpass industry safety standards.
news.summary: Testing conducted by Fluence and DNV revealed that Gridstack Pro 2000, incorporating U.S.-manufactured battery modules, surpassed industry safety standards. Additionally, large-scale fire testing conducted by Fluence and CSA Group further confirmed the product's safety. This marks Gridstack Pro 2000 as the initial domestic content solution to exceed the top safety standards in the industry.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Protectionism is short term inflationary.
Coinbase plans to remove USDT in Europe due to lack of compliance, may reconsider for MiCA-compliant stablecoins later.
news.summary: Coinbase has announced that it will review the possibility of reinstating services for stablecoins that meet MiCA compliance standards in the future.

news.headline: Charlotte's Web presents promising phase 1 results targeting Autism Spectrum Disorder at ACNP Meeting.
news.summary: Exciting discoveries were shared at the 2024 American College of Neuropsychopharmacology Annual Meeting in Louisville, Colorado. Charlotte's Web Holdings, Inc. (stock symbols TSX: CWEB, OTCQX: CWBHF), a top player in CBD hemp extract, unveiled significant findings during the event. The news was announced on December 12, 2024, showcasing the company's cutting-edge research in the field.

news.headline: Toy Story characters, including Buzz Lightyear, join Brawl Stars until Feb 5 in a holiday event.
news.summary: From today until February 5, players of the widely popular mobile game Brawl Stars will have the opportunity to play as Buzz Lightyear, a beloved character from Pixar's Toy Story franchise. This exciting inclusion brings a nostalgic touch to the game, offering fans a special experience during the holiday season. This limited-time feature is sure to thrill and engage fans of both Brawl Stars and the iconic Toy Story series.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: We have not discussed neutral rate level in meeting.
ECB's President Lagarde: The neutral rate can't be determined with precision.
Chartwells K12 reveals top 10 food trends for kids in 2025, shifting from traditional to adventurous options in cafeterias and kitchens. (Including date and location)
news.summary: In Charlotte, N.C., as of December 12, 2024, school chefs and dietitians are noticing a shift in kids' preferences when it comes to cafeteria options. Gone are the days of solely serving chicken nuggets and plain pasta. Kids today are showing a greater interest in more adventurous and diverse food choices on their plates.This shift reflects a growing trend in catering to the evolving tastes of young diners.

news.headline: SSP International marks 66th anniversary, increases placements for first-gen students, opens 2025 program applications.
news.summary: In an effort to assist more first-generation students, SSP International (SSPI), a nonprofit celebrating its 66th year, is expanding its impact by boosting the number of placements. This initiative aims to support a larger number of individuals seeking educational opportunities.

news.headline: Eva NYC revamps brand, enhancing packaging & products. Offers quality at low prices. Based in Brooklyn. (111)
news.summary: In Brooklyn, Eva NYC has unveiled new packaging and groundbreaking product offerings to provide high-quality hair solutions at affordable prices. Renowned for their dedication to research and innovation, Eva NYC continues to lead in the hair industry. As of December 12, 2024, the brand is setting new standards with their updated approach.

news.headline: Trump: We're getting corporate taxes down to 15%.
Notification from director/PDMR regarding insider dealings.
NATO Chief Rutte: It is time to shift to a wartime mindset.
Lunit study shows AI model for immunohistochemistry images analysis, with multi-cohort training approach, highlighting accurate results.
news.summary: A recent study published in npj Precision Oncology from SEOUL, South Korea on December 12, 2024, showcased the success of a multi-cohort training approach in accurately analyzing previously unseen immunohistochemistry data. Lunit, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven tools for cancer diagnostics listed as KRX:328130.KQ, played a significant role in this research. The findings emphasize the importance of innovative methods in handling cancer data, underscoring the potential for advancements in the field.

news.headline: KYOCERA AVX released industry's highest power 0603 resistor, the new CR Series, for high-reliability performance in various applications.
news.summary: Introducing the latest CR Series high-power chip resistor, boasting non-magnetic properties and meeting MIL-PRF-55342 standards. This innovative resistor is engineered to provide exceptional reliability in a range of industries including communications, instrumentation, test and measurement, as well as military and defense sectors. This groundbreaking product was unveiled in Fountain Inn, South Carolina on December 12, 2024.

news.headline: Private sector leads in 63% of Chief AI Officer appointments per Altrata study. AI influences corporate talent strategy.
news.summary: A recent report by Altrata delves into the background and attributes of the Chief AI Officer role. The study, titled 2024 Executive Insight: Chief AI Officers, was published today by Altrata in New York City. Altrata is known for its expertise in analyzing the affluent and influential.

news.headline: Equity increase and new total voting rights disclosed, enhancing shareholder participation.
NATO Chief Rutte: We are not ready for what is coming in 4-5 years.
